title: The girls are OBSESSED with these milk flavoring straws from @Sippahh...
description: The girls are OBSESSED with these milk flavoring straws from @Sippahh  straws 😋 and all of their fun flavors! My girls have never been big milk drinkers, but these straws have had them begging to drink multiple glasses a day everyday since we got them! And the best part is each straw contains less than 1/2 a teaspoon of sugar so it is so much healthier than syrups and powders that are typically used to flavor milk! Safe to say, these are a 10/10 at our house! Use code “SIPMILK10” for 10% off!  #momsoftiktok #foryoupage #sisters #sippahstraw #yummy
